revision.comment: new template for .map JSON data on commons. Copied/derived from old revision of [[Template:Attached KML]] - https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Template:Attached_KML&oldid=652783844
Evad37 moved page [[User:Evad37/Template:Attached JSON]] to [[Template:Attached JSON]]: move out of sandbox
re-writing so that geolines and geoshapes can be used
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{display|title,inline}}} |title|title, inline|inline, title|title,inline|inline,title ='''{{#tag:maplink| { "type": "ExternalData", "service": {{#switch:{{{type|line}}} |data="page" |line="geoline" |shape="geoshape" }},{{#if:{{{id|{{{ids|demo}}}}}}| "ids": "{{{id|{{{ids|Q2108}}}}}}"}}{{#if:{{{from|}}}| "title": "{{{from|}}}"}}, "properties": { "title": "{{{title|{{PAGENAME}}}}}",{{#if:{{{description|}}}| "description": "{{{description}}}",}} "stroke": "{{{stroke-color|{{{stroke-colour|#ff0000}}}}}}", "stroke-width": {{{stroke-width|8}}} } } |zoom={{{zoom|8}}}|text={{{text|Map}}}|class="{{if declined|{{{icon|}}}|no-icon}}"}}'''}}{{#switch:{{{display|}}} |inline|title, inline|inline, title|title,inline|inline,title|#default={{#tag:maplink| { "type": "ExternalData", "service": {{#switch:{{{type|data}}} |data="page" |line="geoline" |shape="geoshape" }},{{#if:{{{id|{{{ids|}}}}}}| "ids": "{{{id|{{{ids|}}}}}}"}}{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}| "title": "{{{from|Data:Sandbox/Evad37/St Georges Terrace.map}}}"}}, "properties": { "title": "{{{title|{{PAGENAME}}}}}",{{#if:{{{description|}}}| "description": "{{{description}}}",}} "stroke": "{{{stroke-color|{{{stroke-colour|#ff0000}}}}}}", "stroke-width": {{{stroke-width|8}}} } } |zoom={{{zoom|8}}}|text={{{text|Map}}}|class="{{if declined|{{{icon|}}}|no-icon}}"}}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Evad37 moved page [[Template:Attached JSON]] to [[Template:Maplink]]: more accurate, now that the template scope is broader
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{display|title,inline}}} |title|title, inline|inline, title|title,inline|inline,title ='''{{#tag:maplink| { "type": "ExternalData", "service": {{#switch:{{{type|line}}} |data="page" |line="geoline" |shape="geoshape" }},{{#if:{{{id|{{{ids|demo}}}}}}| "ids": "{{{id|{{{ids|Q2108}}}}}}"}}{{#if:{{{from|}}}| "title": "{{{from|}}}"}}, "properties": { "title": "{{{title|{{PAGENAME}}}}}",{{#if:{{{description|}}}| "description": "{{{description}}}",}} "stroke": "{{{stroke-color|{{{stroke-colour|#ff0000}}}}}}", "stroke-width": {{{stroke-width|8}}} } } |zoom={{{zoom|8}}}|text={{{text|Map}}}|class="{{if declined|{{{icon|}}}|no-icon}}"}}'''}}{{#switch:{{{display|}}} |inline|title, inline|inline, title|title,inline|inline,title|#default={{#tag:maplink| { "type": "ExternalData", "service": {{#switch:{{{type|data}}} |data="page" |line="geoline" |shape="geoshape" }},{{#if:{{{id|{{{ids|}}}}}}| "ids": "{{{id|{{{ids|}}}}}}"}}{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}| "title": "{{{from|Data:Sandbox/Evad37/St Georges Terrace.map}}}"}}, "properties": { "title": "{{{title|{{PAGENAME}}}}}",{{#if:{{{description|}}}| "description": "{{{description}}}",}} "stroke": "{{{stroke-color|{{{stroke-colour|#ff0000}}}}}}", "stroke-width": {{{stroke-width|8}}} } } |zoom={{{zoom|8}}}|text={{{text|Map}}}|class="{{if declined|{{{icon|}}}|no-icon}}"}}}} {{documentation}}

{{#switch:{{{display|title,inline}}} |title|title, inline|inline, title|title,inline|inline,title ='''{{#tag:maplink| { "type": "ExternalData", "service": {{#switch:{{{type|line}}} |data="page" |line="geoline" |shape="geoshape" }},{{#if:{{{id|{{{ids|demo}}}}}}| "ids": "{{{id|{{{ids|Q2108}}}}}}"}}{{#if:{{{from|}}}| "title": "{{{from|}}}"}}, "properties": { "title": "{{{title|{{PAGENAME}}}}}",{{#if:{{{description|}}}| "description": "{{{description}}}",}} "stroke": "{{{stroke-color|{{{stroke-colour|#ff0000}}}}}}", "stroke-width": {{{stroke-width|8}}} } } |zoom={{{zoom|8}}}|text={{{text|Map}}}|class="{{if declined|{{{icon|}}}|no-icon}}"}}'''}}{{#switch:{{{display|}}} |inline|title, inline|inline, title|title,inline|inline,title|#default={{#tag:maplink| { "type": "ExternalData", "service": {{#switch:{{{type|data}}} |data="page" |line="geoline" |shape="geoshape" }},{{#if:{{{id|{{{ids|}}}}}}| "ids": "{{{id|{{{ids|}}}}}}"}}{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}| "title": "{{{from|Sandbox/Evad37/St Georges Terrace.map}}}"}}, "properties": { "title": "{{{title|{{PAGENAME}}}}}",{{#if:{{{description|}}}| "description": "{{{description}}}",}} "stroke": "{{{stroke-color|{{{stroke-colour|#ff0000}}}}}}", "stroke-width": {{{stroke-width|8}}} } } |zoom={{{zoom|8}}}|text={{{text|Map}}}|class="{{if declined|{{{icon|}}}|no-icon}}"}}}} {{documentation}}

{{#switch:{{{display|title,inline}}} |title|title, inline|inline, title|title,inline|inline,title ='''{{#tag:maplink| { "type": "ExternalData", "service": {{#if:{{{type|}}}|{{#switch:{{{type|}}} |data="page" |line="geoline" |shape="geoshape" }}|{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}|"page"}}}},{{#if:{{{id|{{{ids|{{#if:{{{from|}}}||{{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}}}}}}}}}}| "ids": "{{{id|{{{ids|{{#if:{{{from|}}}||{{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}}}}}}}}}}"}}{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}| "title": "{{{from|Sandbox/Evad37/St Georges Terrace.map}}}"}}, "properties": { "title": "{{{title|{{PAGENAME}}}}}",{{#if:{{{description|}}}| "description": "{{{description}}}",}} "stroke": "{{{stroke-color|{{{stroke-colour|#ff0000}}}}}}", "stroke-width": {{{stroke-width|8}}} } } |{{#if:{{{zoom|}}}|zoom|null}}={{{zoom|}}}|text={{{text|Map}}}|class="{{if declined|{{{icon|}}}|no-icon}}"}}'''}}{{#switch:{{{display|}}} |inline|title, inline|inline, title|title,inline|inline,title|#default={{#tag:maplink| { "type": "ExternalData", "service": {{#if:{{{type|}}}|{{#switch:{{{type|}}} |data="page" |line="geoline" |shape="geoshape" }}|{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}|"page"}}}},{{#if:{{{id|{{{ids|{{#if:{{{from|}}}||{{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}}}}}}}}}}| "ids": "{{{id|{{{ids|{{#if:{{{from|}}}||{{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}}}}}}}}}}"}}{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}| "title": "{{{from|Sandbox/Evad37/St Georges Terrace.map}}}"}}, "properties": { "title": "{{{title|{{PAGENAME}}}}}",{{#if:{{{description|}}}| "description": "{{{description}}}",}} "stroke": "{{{stroke-color|{{{stroke-colour|#ff0000}}}}}}", "stroke-width": {{{stroke-width|8}}} } } |{{#if:{{{zoom|}}}|zoom|null}}={{{zoom|}}}|text={{{text|Map}}}|class="{{if declined|{{{icon|}}}|no-icon}}"}}}} {{documentation}}

{{#switch:{{{display|title,inline}}} |title|title, inline|inline, title|title,inline|inline,title ='''{{#tag:maplink| { "type": "ExternalData", "service": {{#if:{{{type|}}}|{{#switch:{{{type|}}} |data="page" |line="geoline" |shape="geoshape" }}|{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}|"page"}}}},{{#if:{{{id|{{{ids|{{#if:{{{from|}}}||{{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}}}}}}}}}}| "ids": "{{{id|{{{ids|{{#if:{{{from|}}}||{{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}}}}}}}}}}"}}{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}| "title": "{{{from|Sandbox/Evad37/St Georges Terrace.map}}}"}}, "properties": { "title": "{{{title|{{PAGENAME}}}}}",{{#if:{{{description|}}}| "description": "{{{description}}}",}} "stroke": "{{{stroke-color|{{{stroke-colour|#ff0000}}}}}}", "stroke-width": {{{stroke-width|6}}} } } |{{#if:{{{zoom|}}}|zoom|null}}={{{zoom|}}}|text={{{text|Map}}}|class="{{if declined|{{{icon|}}}|no-icon}}"}}'''}}{{#switch:{{{display|}}} |inline|title, inline|inline, title|title,inline|inline,title|#default={{#tag:maplink| { "type": "ExternalData", "service": {{#if:{{{type|}}}|{{#switch:{{{type|}}} |data="page" |line="geoline" |shape="geoshape" }}|{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}|"page"}}}},{{#if:{{{id|{{{ids|{{#if:{{{from|}}}||{{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}}}}}}}}}}| "ids": "{{{id|{{{ids|{{#if:{{{from|}}}||{{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}}}}}}}}}}"}}{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}| "title": "{{{from|Sandbox/Evad37/St Georges Terrace.map}}}"}}, "properties": { "title": "{{{title|{{PAGENAME}}}}}",{{#if:{{{description|}}}| "description": "{{{description}}}",}} "stroke": "{{{stroke-color|{{{stroke-colour|#ff0000}}}}}}", "stroke-width": {{{stroke-width|6}}} } } |{{#if:{{{zoom|}}}|zoom|null}}={{{zoom|}}}|text={{{text|Map}}}|class="{{if declined|{{{icon|}}}|no-icon}}"}}}} {{documentation}}

{{#switch:{{{display|title,inline}}} |title|title, inline|inline, title|title,inline|inline,title ='''{{#tag:maplink| { "type": "ExternalData", "service": {{#if:{{{type|}}}|{{#switch:{{{type|}}} |data="page" |line="geoline" |shape="geoshape" }}|{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}|"page"}}}},{{#if:{{{id|{{{ids|{{#if:{{{from|}}}||{{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}}}}}}}}}}| "ids": "{{{id|{{{ids|{{#if:{{{from|}}}||{{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}}}}}}}}}}"}}{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}| "title": "{{{from|Sandbox/Evad37/St Georges Terrace.map}}}"}}, "properties": { "title": "{{{title|{{PAGENAME}}}}}",{{#if:{{{description|}}}| "description": "{{{description}}}",}} "stroke": "{{{stroke-color|{{{stroke-colour|#ff0000}}}}}}", "stroke-width": {{{stroke-width|6}}} } } |{{#if:{{{zoom|}}}|zoom|null}}={{{zoom|}}}|text={{{text|Map}}}|class="{{if declined|{{{icon|}}}|no-icon}}"}}'''}}{{#switch:{{{display|}}} |title=|inline|title, inline|inline, title|title,inline|inline,title|#default={{#tag:maplink| { "type": "ExternalData", "service": {{#if:{{{type|}}}|{{#switch:{{{type|}}} |data="page" |line="geoline" |shape="geoshape" }}|{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}|"page"}}}},{{#if:{{{id|{{{ids|{{#if:{{{from|}}}||{{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}}}}}}}}}}| "ids": "{{{id|{{{ids|{{#if:{{{from|}}}||{{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}}}}}}}}}}"}}{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}| "title": "{{{from|Sandbox/Evad37/St Georges Terrace.map}}}"}}, "properties": { "title": "{{{title|{{PAGENAME}}}}}",{{#if:{{{description|}}}| "description": "{{{description}}}",}} "stroke": "{{{stroke-color|{{{stroke-colour|#ff0000}}}}}}", "stroke-width": {{{stroke-width|6}}} } } |{{#if:{{{zoom|}}}|zoom|null}}={{{zoom|}}}|text={{{text|Map}}}|class="{{if declined|{{{icon|}}}|no-icon}}"}}}} {{documentation}}

{{#switch:{{{display|title,inline}}} |title|title, inline|inline, title|title,inline|inline,title ='''{{#tag:maplink| { "type": "ExternalData", "service": {{#if:{{{type|}}}|{{#switch:{{{type|}}} |data="page" |line="geoline" |shape="geoshape" |shape-inverse="geomask" }}|{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}|"page"}}}},{{#if:{{{id|{{{ids|{{#if:{{{from|}}}||{{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}}}}}}}}}}| "ids": "{{{id|{{{ids|{{#if:{{{from|}}}||{{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}}}}}}}}}}"}}{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}| "title": "{{{from|Sandbox/Evad37/St Georges Terrace.map}}}"}}, "properties": { "title": "{{{title|{{PAGENAME}}}}}",{{#if:{{{description|}}}| "description": "{{{description}}}",}} "stroke": "{{{stroke-color|{{{stroke-colour|#ff0000}}}}}}", "stroke-width": {{{stroke-width|6}}} } } |{{#if:{{{zoom|}}}|zoom|null}}={{{zoom|}}}|text={{{text|Map}}}|class="{{if declined|{{{icon|}}}|no-icon}}"}}'''}}{{#switch:{{{display|}}} |title=|inline|title, inline|inline, title|title,inline|inline,title|#default={{#tag:maplink| { "type": "ExternalData", "service": {{#if:{{{type|}}}|{{#switch:{{{type|}}} |data="page" |line="geoline" |shape="geoshape" |shape-inverse="geomask" }}|{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}|"page"}}}},{{#if:{{{id|{{{ids|{{#if:{{{from|}}}||{{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}}}}}}}}}}| "ids": "{{{id|{{{ids|{{#if:{{{from|}}}||{{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}}}}}}}}}}"}}{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}| "title": "{{{from|Sandbox/Evad37/St Georges Terrace.map}}}"}}, "properties": { "title": "{{{title|{{PAGENAME}}}}}",{{#if:{{{description|}}}| "description": "{{{description}}}",}} "stroke": "{{{stroke-color|{{{stroke-colour|#ff0000}}}}}}", "stroke-width": {{{stroke-width|6}}} } } |{{#if:{{{zoom|}}}|zoom|null}}={{{zoom|}}}|text={{{text|Map}}}|class="{{if declined|{{{icon|}}}|no-icon}}"}}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: add some <noinclude>demo</noinclude> so that the demos at the top of the page work
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{display|title,inline}}} |title|title, inline|inline, title|title,inline|inline,title ='''{{#tag:maplink| { "type": "ExternalData", "service": {{#if:{{{type|}}}|{{#switch:{{{type|}}} |data="page" |line="geoline" |shape="geoshape" |shape-inverse="geomask" }}|{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}|"page"}}}},{{#if:{{{id|{{{ids|{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}||{{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}}}}}}}}}}| "ids": "{{{id|{{{ids|{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}||{{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}}}}}}}}}}"}}{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}| "title": "{{{from|Sandbox/Evad37/St Georges Terrace.map}}}"}}, "properties": { "title": "{{{title|{{PAGENAME}}}}}",{{#if:{{{description|}}}| "description": "{{{description}}}",}} "stroke": "{{{stroke-color|{{{stroke-colour|#ff0000}}}}}}", "stroke-width": {{{stroke-width|6}}} } } |{{#if:{{{zoom|}}}|zoom|null}}={{{zoom|}}}|text={{{text|Map}}}|class="{{if declined|{{{icon|}}}|no-icon}}"}}'''}}{{#switch:{{{display|}}} |title=|inline|title, inline|inline, title|title,inline|inline,title|#default={{#tag:maplink| { "type": "ExternalData", "service": {{#if:{{{type|}}}|{{#switch:{{{type|}}} |data="page" |line="geoline" |shape="geoshape" |shape-inverse="geomask" }}|{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}|"page"}}}},{{#if:{{{id|{{{ids|{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}||{{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}}}}}}}}}}| "ids": "{{{id|{{{ids|{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}||{{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}}}}}}}}}}"}}{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}| "title": "{{{from|Sandbox/Evad37/St Georges Terrace.map}}}"}}, "properties": { "title": "{{{title|{{PAGENAME}}}}}",{{#if:{{{description|}}}| "description": "{{{description}}}",}} "stroke": "{{{stroke-color|{{{stroke-colour|#ff0000}}}}}}", "stroke-width": {{{stroke-width|6}}} } } |{{#if:{{{zoom|}}}|zoom|null}}={{{zoom|}}}|text={{{text|Map}}}|class="{{if declined|{{{icon|}}}|no-icon}}"}}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: update from sandbox: show points from supplied coordinates or wikidata
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{display|title,inline}}} |title|title, inline|inline, title|title,inline|inline,title ='''{{#tag:maplink| { {{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|point|"type": "Feature", "geometry": { "type": "Point", "coordinates": [{{#invoke:coordinates|coord2text|{{{coord| {{WikidataCoord|display=| {{{id| {{{ids| {{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}} }}} }}} }} }}}|long}}, {{#invoke:coordinates|coord2text|{{{coord| {{WikidataCoord|display=| {{{id| {{{ids| {{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}} }}} }}} }} }}}|lat}}] }, "properties": { "title": "{{{title|{{PAGENAME}}}}}"{{#if:{{{description|}}}|, "description": "{{{description}}}"}}, "marker-symbol":"{{{marker|marker}}}", "marker-color": "5E74F3" }|"type": "ExternalData", "service": {{#if:{{{type|}}}|{{#switch:{{{type|}}} |data="page" |line="geoline" |shape="geoshape" |shape-inverse="geomask" }}|{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}|"page"}}}},{{#if:{{{id|{{{ids|{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}||{{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}}}}}}}}}}| "ids": "{{{id|{{{ids|{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}||{{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}}}}}}}}}}"}}{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}| "title": "{{{from|Sandbox/Evad37/St Georges Terrace.map}}}"}}, "properties": { "title": "{{{title|{{PAGENAME}}}}}",{{#if:{{{description|}}}| "description": "{{{description}}}",}} "stroke": "{{{stroke-color|{{{stroke-colour|#ff0000}}}}}}", "stroke-width": {{{stroke-width|6}}} } }} } |{{#if:{{{zoom|}}}|zoom|null}}={{{zoom|}}}|text={{{text|Map}}}|class="{{if declined|{{{icon|}}}|no-icon}}"|{{#ifeq:{{{type}}}|point|longitude|null}}={{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|point|{{#invoke:coordinates|coord2text|{{{coord| {{WikidataCoord|display=| {{{id| {{{ids| {{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}} }}} }}} }} }}}|long}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{type}}}|point|latitude|null}}={{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|point|{{#invoke:coordinates|coord2text|{{{coord| {{WikidataCoord|display=| {{{id| {{{ids| {{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}} }}} }}} }} }}}|lat}}}}}}'''}}{{#switch:{{{display|}}} |title=|inline|title, inline|inline, title|title,inline|inline,title|#default={{#tag:maplink| { {{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|point|"type": "Feature", "geometry": { "type": "Point", "coordinates": [{{#invoke:coordinates|coord2text|{{{coord| {{WikidataCoord|display=| {{{id| {{{ids| {{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}} }}} }}} }} }}}|long}}, {{#invoke:coordinates|coord2text|{{{coord| {{WikidataCoord|display=| {{{id| {{{ids| {{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}} }}} }}} }} }}}|lat}}] }, "properties": { "title": "{{{title|{{PAGENAME}}}}}"{{#if:{{{description|}}}|, "description": "{{{description}}}"}}, "marker-symbol":"{{{marker|marker}}}", "marker-color": "5E74F3" }|"type": "ExternalData", "service": {{#if:{{{type|}}}|{{#switch:{{{type|}}} |data="page" |line="geoline" |shape="geoshape" |shape-inverse="geomask" }}|{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}|"page"}}}},{{#if:{{{id|{{{ids|{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}||{{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}}}}}}}}}}| "ids": "{{{id|{{{ids|{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}||{{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}}}}}}}}}}"}}{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}| "title": "{{{from|Sandbox/Evad37/St Georges Terrace.map}}}"}}, "properties": { "title": "{{{title|{{PAGENAME}}}}}",{{#if:{{{description|}}}| "description": "{{{description}}}",}} "stroke": "{{{stroke-color|{{{stroke-colour|#ff0000}}}}}}", "stroke-width": {{{stroke-width|6}}} } }} } |{{#if:{{{zoom|}}}|zoom|null}}={{{zoom|}}}|text={{{text|Map}}}|class="{{if declined|{{{icon|}}}|no-icon}}"|{{#ifeq:{{{type}}}|point|longitude|null}}={{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|point|{{#invoke:coordinates|coord2text|{{{coord| {{WikidataCoord|display=| {{{id| {{{ids| {{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}} }}} }}} }} }}}|long}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{type}}}|point|latitude|null}}={{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|point|{{#invoke:coordinates|coord2text|{{{coord| {{WikidataCoord|display=| {{{id| {{{ids| {{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}} }}} }}} }} }}}|lat}}}}}}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: allow raw data, like [[Template:Mapbox raw data]]
revision.text: {{#switch:{{{display|title,inline}}} |title|title, inline|inline, title|title,inline|inline,title ='''{{#tag:maplink| {{{raw| { {{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|point|"type": "Feature", "geometry": { "type": "Point", "coordinates": [{{#invoke:coordinates|coord2text|{{{coord| {{WikidataCoord|display=| {{{id| {{{ids| {{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}} }}} }}} }} }}}|long}}, {{#invoke:coordinates|coord2text|{{{coord| {{WikidataCoord|display=| {{{id| {{{ids| {{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}} }}} }}} }} }}}|lat}}] }, "properties": { "title": "{{{title|{{PAGENAME}}}}}"{{#if:{{{description|}}}|, "description": "{{{description}}}"}}, "marker-symbol":"{{{marker|marker}}}", "marker-color": "5E74F3" }|"type": "ExternalData", "service": {{#if:{{{type|}}}|{{#switch:{{{type|}}} |data="page" |line="geoline" |shape="geoshape" |shape-inverse="geomask" }}|{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}|"page"}}}},{{#if:{{{id|{{{ids|{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}||{{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}}}}}}}}}}| "ids": "{{{id|{{{ids|{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}||{{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}}}}}}}}}}"}}{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}| "title": "{{{from|Sandbox/Evad37/St Georges Terrace.map}}}"}}, "properties": { "title": "{{{title|{{PAGENAME}}}}}",{{#if:{{{description|}}}| "description": "{{{description}}}",}} "stroke": "{{{stroke-color|{{{stroke-colour|#ff0000}}}}}}", "stroke-width": {{{stroke-width|6}}} } }} }}}} |{{#if:{{{zoom|}}}|zoom|null}}={{{zoom|}}}|text={{{text|Map}}}|class="{{if declined|{{{icon|}}}|no-icon}}"|{{#ifeq:{{{type}}}|point|longitude|null}}={{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|point|{{#invoke:coordinates|coord2text|{{{coord| {{WikidataCoord|display=| {{{id| {{{ids| {{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}} }}} }}} }} }}}|long}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{type}}}|point|latitude|null}}={{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|point|{{#invoke:coordinates|coord2text|{{{coord| {{WikidataCoord|display=| {{{id| {{{ids| {{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}} }}} }}} }} }}}|lat}}}}}}'''}}{{#switch:{{{display|}}} |title=|inline|title, inline|inline, title|title,inline|inline,title|#default={{#tag:maplink| {{{raw| { {{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|point|"type": "Feature", "geometry": { "type": "Point", "coordinates": [{{#invoke:coordinates|coord2text|{{{coord| {{WikidataCoord|display=| {{{id| {{{ids| {{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}} }}} }}} }} }}}|long}}, {{#invoke:coordinates|coord2text|{{{coord| {{WikidataCoord|display=| {{{id| {{{ids| {{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}} }}} }}} }} }}}|lat}}] }, "properties": { "title": "{{{title|{{PAGENAME}}}}}"{{#if:{{{description|}}}|, "description": "{{{description}}}"}}, "marker-symbol":"{{{marker|marker}}}", "marker-color": "5E74F3" }|"type": "ExternalData", "service": {{#if:{{{type|}}}|{{#switch:{{{type|}}} |data="page" |line="geoline" |shape="geoshape" |shape-inverse="geomask" }}|{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}|"page"}}}},{{#if:{{{id|{{{ids|{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}||{{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}}}}}}}}}}| "ids": "{{{id|{{{ids|{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}||{{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}}}}}}}}}}"}}{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}| "title": "{{{from|Sandbox/Evad37/St Georges Terrace.map}}}"}}, "properties": { "title": "{{{title|{{PAGENAME}}}}}",{{#if:{{{description|}}}| "description": "{{{description}}}",}} "stroke": "{{{stroke-color|{{{stroke-colour|#ff0000}}}}}}", "stroke-width": {{{stroke-width|6}}} } }} }}}} |{{#if:{{{zoom|}}}|zoom|null}}={{{zoom|}}}|text={{{text|Map}}}|class="{{if declined|{{{icon|}}}|no-icon}}"|{{#ifeq:{{{type}}}|point|longitude|null}}={{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|point|{{#invoke:coordinates|coord2text|{{{coord| {{WikidataCoord|display=| {{{id| {{{ids| {{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}} }}} }}} }} }}}|long}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{type}}}|point|latitude|null}}={{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|point|{{#invoke:coordinates|coord2text|{{{coord| {{WikidataCoord|display=| {{{id| {{{ids| {{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}} }}} }}} }} }}}|lat}}}}}}}} {{documentation}}

{{#switch:{{{display|title,inline}}} |title|title, inline|inline, title|title,inline|inline,title ='''{{#tag:maplink| {{{raw| { {{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|point|"type": "Feature", "geometry": { "type": "Point", "coordinates": [{{#invoke:coordinates|coord2text|{{{coord| {{WikidataCoord|display=| {{{id| {{{ids| {{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}} }}} }}} }} }}}|long}}, {{#invoke:coordinates|coord2text|{{{coord| {{WikidataCoord|display=| {{{id| {{{ids| {{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}} }}} }}} }} }}}|lat}}] }, "properties": { "title": "{{{title|{{PAGENAME}}}}}"{{#if:{{{description|}}}|, "description": "{{{description}}}"}}, "marker-symbol":"{{{marker|marker}}}", "marker-color": "5E74F3" }|"type": "ExternalData", "service": {{#if:{{{type|}}}|{{#switch:{{{type|}}} |data="page" |line="geoline" |shape="geoshape" |shape-inverse="geomask" }}|{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}|"page"}}}},{{#if:{{{id|{{{ids|{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}||{{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}}}}}}}}}}| "ids": "{{{id|{{{ids|{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}||{{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}}}}}}}}}}"}}{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}| "title": "{{{from|Sandbox/Evad37/St Georges Terrace.map}}}"}}, "properties": { "title": "{{{title|{{PAGENAME}}}}}",{{#if:{{{description|}}}| "description": "{{{description}}}",}} "stroke": "{{{stroke-color|{{{stroke-colour|#ff0000}}}}}}", "stroke-width": {{{stroke-width|6}}} } }} }}}} |{{#if:{{{zoom|}}}|zoom|null}}={{{zoom|}}}|text={{{text|Map}}}|class="{{if declined|{{{icon|}}}|no-icon}}"|{{#ifeq:{{{type}}}|point|longitude|null}}={{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|point|{{#invoke:coordinates|coord2text|{{{coord| {{WikidataCoord|display=| {{{id| {{{ids| {{{ids| {{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}} }}} }}} }} }}}|lat}}}}}}'''}}{{#switch:{{{display|}}} |title=|inline|title, inline|inline, title|title,inline|inline,title|#default={{#tag:{{if affirmed|{{{frame}}}|mapframe|maplink}}| {{{raw| { {{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|point|"type": "Feature", "geometry": { "type": "Point", "coordinates": [{{#invoke:coordinates|coord2text|{{{coord| {{WikidataCoord|display=| {{{id| {{{ids| {{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}} }}} }}} }} }}}|long}}, {{#invoke:coordinates|coord2text|{{{coord| {{WikidataCoord|display=| {{{id| {{{ids| "marker-symbol":"{{{marker|marker}}}", "marker-color": "5E74F3" }|"type": "ExternalData", "service": {{#if:{{{type|}}}|{{#switch:{{{type|}}} |data="page" |line="geoline" |shape="geoshape" |shape-inverse="geomask" }}|{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}|"page"}}}},{{#if:{{{id|{{{ids|{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}||{{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}}}}}}}}}}| "ids": "{{{title|{{PAGENAME}}}}}",{{#if:{{{description|}}}| "description": "{{{description}}}",}} "stroke": "{{{stroke-color|{{{stroke-colour|#ff0000}}}}}}", "stroke-width": {{{stroke-width|6}}} } }} }}}} |{{#if:{{{zoom|}}}|zoom|null}}={{{zoom|}}}|width={{{frame-width|300}}}|height={{{frame-height|200}}}|text={{{text|Map}}}|class="{{if declined|{{{icon|}}}|no-icon}}"|{{#if:{{{frame-lat|{{{frame-latitude|}}}}}}|latitude|null}}={{{frame-lat|{{{frame-latitude|}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{frame-long|{{{frame-longitude|}}}}}}|longitude|null}}={{{frame-long|{{{frame-longitude|}}}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{type}}}|point|longitude|null}}={{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|point|{{#invoke:coordinates|coord2text|{{{coord| {{WikidataCoord|display=| {{{id| {{{ids| {{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}} }}} }}} }} }} }}}|lat}}}}}}}} {{documentation}}

{{#switch:{{{display|title,inline}}} |title|title, inline|inline, title|title,inline|inline,title ='''{{#tag:maplink| {{{raw| { {{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|point|"type": "Feature", "geometry": { "type": "Point", "coordinates": [{{#invoke:coordinates|coord2text|{{{coord| {{WikidataCoord|display=| {{{id| {{{ids| {{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}} }}} }}} }} }}}|long}}, "{{{title|{{PAGENAME}}}}}",{{#if:{{{description|}}}| "description": "{{{description}}}",}} "stroke": "{{{stroke-color|{{{stroke-colour|#ff0000}}}}}}", "stroke-width": {{{stroke-width|6}}} } }} }}}} |{{#if:{{{zoom|}}}|zoom|null}}={{{zoom|}}}|text={{{text|Map}}}|class="{{if declined|{{{icon|}}}|no-icon}}"|{{#ifeq:{{{type}}}|point|longitude|null}}={{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|point|{{#invoke:coordinates|coord2text|{{{coord| {{WikidataCoord|display=| {{{id| {{{ids| {{{ids| {{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}} }}} }}} }} }}}|lat}}}}}}'''}}{{#switch:{{{display|}}} |title=|inline|title, inline|inline, title|title,inline|inline,title|#default={{#tag:{{if affirmed|{{{frame}}}|mapframe|maplink}}| {{{raw| { {{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|point|"type": "Feature", "geometry": { "type": "Point", "coordinates": [{{#invoke:coordinates|coord2text|{{{coord| {{WikidataCoord|display=| {{{id| {{{ids| {{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}} }}} }}} }} }}}|long}}, {{#invoke:coordinates|coord2text|{{{coord| {{WikidataCoord|display=| {{{id| {{{ids| {{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}} }}} }}} }} }}}|lat}}] }, "properties": { "title": "{{{title|{{PAGENAME}}}}}"{{#if:{{{description|}}}|, "description": "{{{description}}}"}}, "marker-symbol":"{{{marker|marker}}}", "marker-color": "5E74F3" }|"type": "ExternalData", "service": {{#if:{{{type|}}}|{{#switch:{{{type|}}} |data="page" |line="geoline" |shape="geoshape" |shape-inverse="geomask" }}|{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}|"page"}}}},{{#if:{{{id|{{{ids|{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}||{{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}}}}}}}}}}| "ids": "{{{id|{{{ids|{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}||{{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}}}}}}}}}}"}}{{#if:{{{from|demo}}}| "title": "{{{from|Sandbox/Evad37/St Georges Terrace.map}}}"}}, "properties": { "title": "{{{title|{{PAGENAME}}}}}",{{#if:{{{description|}}}| "description": "{{{description}}}",}} "stroke": "{{{stroke-color|{{{stroke-colour|#ff0000}}}}}}", "stroke-width": {{{stroke-width|6}}} } }} }}}} |{{#if:{{{zoom|}}}|zoom|null}}={{{zoom|}}}|width={{{frame-width|300}}}|height={{{frame-height|200}}}|{{if affirmed|{{{plain|}}}|frameless|null}}=1|{{if affirmed|{{{plain|}}}|null|text}}={{{text|Map}}}|class="{{if declined|{{{icon|}}}|no-icon}}"|{{#if:{{{frame-lat|{{{frame-latitude|}}}}}}|latitude|null}}={{{frame-lat|{{{frame-latitude|}}}}}}|{{#if:{{{frame-long|{{{frame-longitude|}}}}}}|longitude|null}}={{{frame-long|{{{frame-longitude|}}}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{type}}}|point|longitude|null}}={{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|point|{{#invoke:coordinates|coord2text|{{{coord| {{WikidataCoord|display=| {{{id| {{{ids| {{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}} }}} }}} }} }}}|long}}}}|{{#ifeq:{{{type}}}|point|latitude|null}}={{#ifeq:{{{type|}}}|point|{{#invoke:coordinates|coord2text|{{{coord| {{WikidataCoord|display=| {{{id| {{{ids| {{#invoke:Wikidata|pageId}} }}} }}} }} }}}|lat}}}}}}}} {{documentation}}

revision.comment: Upgrade to use new Lua module – allows specifying multiple features on the same map
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#invoke:Mapframe|main}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Maplink|frame=yes|zoom=9|frame-lat=35.90|frame-long=-106.56|text=Mapframe|from=ecos.fws.gov/Endangered habitat 58938/Plethodon neomexicanus.map}}
{{Maplink|display=inline,title|text=Maplink|from=ecos.fws.gov/Endangered habitat 58938/Plethodon neomexicanus.map}}
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>[[File:Spreading.jpg]]</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Maplink|frame=yes|zoom=9|frame-lat=35.90|frame-long=-106.56|text=Mapframe|from=ecos.fws.gov/Endangered habitat 58938/Plethodon neomexicanus.map}}
{{Maplink|display=inline,title|text=Maplink|from=ecos.fws.gov/Endangered habitat 58938/Plethodon neomexicanus.map}}
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#invoke:Mapframe|main}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Maplink|frame=yes|zoom=9|frame-lat=35.90|frame-long=-106.56|text=Mapframe|from=ecos.fws.gov/Endangered habitat 58938/Plethodon neomexicanus.map}}
{{Maplink|display=inline,title|text=Maplink|from=ecos.fws.gov/Endangered habitat 58938/Plethodon neomexicanus.map}}
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Protected "[[Template:Maplink]]": [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]] ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
